# Spec: generate-sbom.md §Per-Build Filtering
# Rules:
#   - --tags: include components with at least one matching tag
#   - --exclude-tags: remove components with any matching tag (applied after --tags)
#   - Components with no tags: included when --tags empty; excluded when --tags set
#   - Conflicting (same tag in include+exclude) -> CLI error
#   - scope: excluded components are ALWAYS dropped before any tag filtering
#
# EXPECTED GAP: scope: excluded is NOT dropped (FilterComponents does not filter by scope).

# --- Include filter ---
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json --tags core -o out_core.json
exec jq -e '[.components[].name] | sort == ["libmqtt","libtls"]' out_core.json

# --- Include multiple ---
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json --tags core,display -o out_cd.json
exec jq -e '[.components[].name] | sort == ["libgui","libmqtt","libtls"]' out_cd.json

# --- Exclude filter ---
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json --exclude-tags debug -o out_nodebug.json
exec jq -e '[.components[].name] | contains(["trace-tool"]) | not' out_nodebug.json

# --- Conflict detection ---
! exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json --tags core --exclude-tags core -o out_conflict.json
stderr 'conflicting tags'

# --- scope: excluded dropping (SPEC GAP) ---
# No --tags: untagged "build-only" (scope=excluded) should be dropped; but it
# currently appears. Capture the gap.
exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json -o out_all.json
# Spec-correct: contains build-only == false
# Current gap: contains build-only == true
exec jq -e '[.components[].name] | contains(["build-only"])' out_all.json

-- meta.yaml --
app:
  name: app
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme
  license:
    id: MIT
-- .components.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "libmqtt", "version": "4.3.0", "type": "library", "license": "EPL-2.0",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type":"distribution","url":"https://x"}],
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"1111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111"}],
      "tags": ["core","networking"] },
    { "name": "libtls", "version": "3.9.0", "type": "library", "license": "ISC",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type":"distribution","url":"https://x"}],
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"2222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222"}],
      "tags": ["core","networking"] },
    { "name": "libgui", "version": "2.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type":"distribution","url":"https://x"}],
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"3333333333333333333333333333333333333333333333333333333333333333"}],
      "tags": ["display"] },
    { "name": "trace-tool", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type":"distribution","url":"https://x"}],
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"4444444444444444444444444444444444444444444444444444444444444444"}],
      "tags": ["debug"] },
    { "name": "build-only", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "scope": "excluded",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "external_references": [{"type":"distribution","url":"https://x"}],
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"5555555555555555555555555555555555555555555555555555555555555555"}] }
  ]
}
